name: Mediterranean Roast Chicken (Radnor)
recipeIngredient: Juice and grated zest of 2 lemons
4 Cloves garlic, lightly bruised and peeled
2 Chickens (about 2 1/2 pounds each), rinsed well and patted dry
1 1/2 lb Small red new potatoes, scrubbed and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil, lemon juice and zest, garlic, salt, and pepper in a large bowl. Coat the chickens well with the marinade and refrigerate covered overnight.
2. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
3. Place the chickens in a large roasting pan. Put the rosemary sprigs and the garlic from the marinade in the cavities of the chickens. Surround the chickens with the potato halves and olives and drizzle the marinade over all.
4. Roast the chickens, basting occasionally, until the juices run clear when the thickest part of the thigh is pricked with a knife, about 1 hour. Let rest a few minutes before carving.
